utility_evaluation.REASONING: Required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all five keys. Now check if each is fully specified with details and costs: 1) health_coverage: specifies physical and mental health insurance with named plans and explicit monthly costs (€100 and €65). Meets requirement. 2) property_coverage: specifies home/contents insurance with a named plan and monthly cost (€90). Meets requirement. 3) travel_coverage: specifies travel insurance with a named plan and monthly cost (€115). Meets requirement. 4) additional_services: provided as N/A with a note to be sought separately; does not include costs, so not fully specified per requirement of 'any enhancement services with costs.' However, if none selected, N/A could be acceptable but the requirement asks for costs; this lacks costs, so mark as not fully specified. 5) total_budget: provides monthly (€370) and annual (€4,440) costs; fully specified. Therefore, 4 out of 5 are fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes three specific products: LifeFirst Standard Physical Plan, LifeFirst Standard Mental Plan, PrimeHome Premium Coverage, and PrimeTravel Premium Plan. I matched each to the corresponding entries and ratings in the ground-truth sections: primary_health_coverage.physical_health.LifeFirst Standard Plan (rating 9), primary_health_coverage.mental_health.LifeFirst Standard Plan (rating 4), property_protection.home_content.PrimeHome Premium Coverage (rating 3), and mobility_coverage.travel_insurance.PrimeTravel Premium Plan (rating 3).
